name: Daily Health Check
description: Cron-triggered. Asks the orchestrator agent to query Supabase for accounts, cookies, proxies, and the send queue, then compose a 6-bullet plain-English status summary ending with a green/yellow/red light. No inputs needed.

data.label: Health check
data.prompt: Run the daily-health-check workflow: query Supabase for accounts (last_health_check stats), cookies (per-platform freshness), proxies (last successful ping), send_queue (depth + failures last 24h). Compose a 6-bullet status summary in plain English. End with one of: 🟢 all good / 🟡 minor issues / 🔴 needs attention.
